name: Mexican Cornbread Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon baking soda (may need more at low altitudes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the corn meal, baking soda, and salt.
2. Add eggs, milk, and 2/3 cup of bacon grease to the mixture; mix well.
3. Stir in the creamed corn and chopped green chilies.
4. Pour half of the batter into a heavy casserole dish that has had the remaining bacon grease melted into it.
5. Spread with cheese and additional chilies.
6. Add the remaining batter, then sprinkle with the rest of the cheese.
7. Bake at 400°F for 45 minutes.
Yield: 8 servings.
